data.title: Elastic Path expands commerce platform with native search, CMS and hosted frontend
data.description: The update marks a step toward what the company calls its “intelligent commerce” vision — embedding artificial intelligence throughout the commerce stack.

data.title: Amazon expands AI footprint in B2B buying with launch of new tool
data.description: The centerpiece of the rollout, the Amazon Business Assistant, is a conversational AI tool that guides users through account setup, savings opportunities, and purchasing questions in real time.

data.title: PayPal launches 'Pay in 4' service in Canada with Home Depot, Sephora as early users
data.description: PayPal Pay in 4 will split purchases into four payments for shoppers, who can manage options through PayPal's app or website.

data.title: AI forces procurement to evolve — or be left behind
data.description: Two-thirds of the 300-plus procurement leaders McKinsey surveyed say they report directly to the CEO or CFO, reflecting procurement’s growing strategic influence.

data.title: ACV Auctions grows sales and dealer network but signals tougher road ahead
data.description: The Buffalo-based digital marketplace said revenue rose 16% from a year earlier as dealers continued turning to its platform to buy and sell used vehicles.
